creator: georg@graf.priv.at
text:
Yes, please commit the patch! Thanks!

  George

On Mon, Dec 11, 2006 at 02:15:14PM +0000, you wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/py-milter,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/106606 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106606
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
